A.text: All three balls detach and fall off as separate pieces.

B.text: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.

C.text: The bottom and middle balls remain connected, but the top ball separates.

D.text: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.

parsed.answer_value: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.
parsed.rationale: The cut is made through the curved tube halfway between the top and middle balls, which would sever the connection between the bottom ball and the rest of the structure, leaving the top and middle balls still connected.
